title: Mellow Nutty Vietnamese Chicken Curry
description: A nutty and chewy Vietnamese dish featuring red curry paste, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a Mediterranean twist, cooked in a wok using a bain-marie method.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add the sliced shallots and cook until they are lightly browned.
Add the chicken to the wok and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the red curry paste to the wok and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and add the fish sauce, brown sugar, peanuts, and salt to the wok.
Stir the mixture well and cook for 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional peanuts and shallots if desired.
